nasb.text: He shall also sprinkle some of the blood of the sin offering on the side of the altar, while the rest of the blood shall be drained out at the base of the altar: it is a sin offering.

esv.text: and he shall sprinkle some of the blood of the sin offering on the side of the altar, while the rest of the blood shall be drained out at the base of the altar; it is a sin offering.

cnv.text: 然後他要把贖罪祭牲的一些血，彈在祭壇旁邊，其餘的血要在祭壇腳那裡擠出來；這是贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 要把一些鸟血洒在祭坛边，剩下的血要倒在坛脚旁。这是赎罪祭。
